intro.title: Your Soul Map
intro.subtitle: A short journey of self-discovery — that could change everything
intro.description:
The Soul Map is a unique tool we built to understand who you truly are — not just data points, but personality, values, dreams, and lifestyle.
At the end, you'll receive a personal report + discover how many potential matches already exist for you.
intro.privacyNote: No signup, no cost, completely free

discover.title: Discover yourself
discover.description: 8 in-depth sections that paint your unique personality

matches.title: See your potential matches
matches.description: After completing — we'll show you how many profiles could be a match

report.title: Get a personal report
report.description: Download a detailed summary about yourself and what you're looking for

sectionReminder.title: Great job! Section complete
sectionReminder.localSaveNotice: Please note — your answers are currently saved only on this device.
sectionReminder.registerBenefit: Register to save your answers permanently, get real matches, and start finding your person.
sectionReminder.laterNote: You can also register at the end

title.hasMatches: We found {count} potential matches for you!
title.fewMatches: We found some matches that could be right for you

subtitle.hasMatches: Based on your Soul Map, we identified {count} profiles in our system that could be your match.
subtitle.fewMatches: We've started scanning — register so our system can keep searching for you in the background.
subtitle.noMatches: We haven't found exact matches yet — but new people join every day. Register and we'll notify you when we find someone.

report.title: Your Personal Report — Soul Map
report.subtitle: Summary based on your answers
report.registerFooter: Register at neshamatech.com to start receiving real match suggestions

homepageCta.title: Discover Your Soul Map
homepageCta.subtitle: Fill out a short questionnaire and discover how many potential matches are waiting for you
homepageCta.description: No signup, no cost. 10 minutes of self-discovery — and at the end, you'll see how many people in our system could be your match.
